content:
float32) * 0.05
                     for name in method_order}
    method_metrics = {
        name: {"delta_l1": 0.01, "final_delta_e": 0.5, "final_delta_e_p95": 0.8, "ssim": 0.99}
        for name in method_order
    }
    out = tmp_path / "fullscale.png"
    generate_per_frame_sheet(
        frame_idx=30,
        orig_proxy_final=torch.rand(1, 3, 200, 320, device="cuda", dtype=torch.float32),
        gold_final=torch.rand(1, 3, 200, 320, device="cuda", dtype=torch.float32),
        method_finals=method_finals,
        method_deltas=method_deltas,
        method_metrics=method_metrics,
        method_order=method_order,
        out_path=out,
        crop_size=128,  # smaller than default 400 but still > thumb_w / cell
    )
    assert out.exists()
    img = Image.open(out)
    img.verify()
    # Re-open for reading pixels (verify() consumes the stream)
    img = Image.open(out)
    W, _ = img.size
    n_cells = 2 + len(method_order)  # orig_proxy + gold + methods = 11
    # At crop_size=128, crop_w = 128 + padding(12) = 140, thumb_w = max thumb width + 12
    # Expected minimum canvas width: n_cells * 140 + 12 = 11*140 + 12 = 1552
    assert W >= n_cells * 140 + 12, (
        f"canvas too narrow: {W} < {n_cells * 140 + 12} — "
        f"crops row likely clipped"
    )
